mapper.select: SELECT id, name, logo, url, group_id, epg_source_id, status, country, language, score, created_at, updated_at FROM channels WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, logo, url, group_id, epg_source_id, status, country, language, score, created_at, updated_at FROM channels WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.logo, c.url, c.number, c.channel_id, c.enabled, c.provider_id, c.group_id, c.epg_source_id, c.sort_order, c.description, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted FROM channels c INNER JOIN channel_groups g ON c.group_id = g.id WHERE g.name = #{group} AND c.deleted = 0 AND g.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.id ASC
mapper.insert:
UPDATE channels SET deleted = 1； INSERT INTO channels (name, logo, url, group_id, epg_source_id, status, country, language, score, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.logo}, #{item.url}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.epgSourceId}, #{item.status}, #{item.country}, #{item.language}, #{item.score}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, 0)
